title: Social Media Reactions Thread
wikitext:
[]: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by mastafishere » Sun Mar 07, 2021 9:37 pm I haven't seen anyone make a thread and the first screenings have ended. I thought it'd be great if we started collecting them. Everyone wants to talk about the spoilers but I'd rather find out how audiences are taking it. Spoilers without context can make any movie look bad.

[]: Re: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by AnarchoCatboy » Mon Mar 08, 2021 12:54 am Do youtube videos count? I just found a review by a Japanese youtube channel, unfortunately ofc it's in Japanese with no subtitles. It's 20 minutes long though, so that would be a lot of translating. Other than that tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) I've really only seen this. They're watching it 3 times today and then will be doing a spoiler free video, and then assumedly a spoiler filled one or at least posts later on.

[]: Re: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by Keiji » Mon Mar 08, 2021 2:54 am I'm interested by spectators reactions too. edit : looking good on Yahoo Japan Movie Source : https://movies.yahoo.co.jp/movie/364985/

[]: Re: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by Pluto » Wed Mar 10, 2021 2:47 am I really enjoyed eva monkey's spoiler free video who interviews two folks who saw the movie. Evamonkey (spoiler free) [EDIT 3/12] I'm really enjoying the Japanese youtube videos about their analysis on the film. Certainly you will need to know Japanese to get the most out of the meaning but if you're interested type 考察 and シンエヴァ into the youtube search bar.

[]: Re: Shin Eva leak general             Quote Post by Melkor » Sun Mar 14, 2021 2:56 pm Looks like Foxen Anime made a review for the movie. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xLZlKqpyyhQ He's an anime Youtuber that lives in Japan and speaks the language, so he was able to see the movie twice before making his review.

[]: Re: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by Pluto » Wed Mar 17, 2021 5:22 pm I really enjoyed Third Impakt's movie summary . I checked it after I came out of the theater a second time and everything is essentially there plotwise Board Member, Intermediate O's review . Honestly he didn't like it after seeing the movie four times but his arguments for not liking it are sound because he's coming from a writing perspective. I never really thought too deeply about the writing in Eva and enjoy for several other reasons so I can't fault him for having a well-thought out opinion even though I disagree with it.

[]: Re: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 19, 2021 12:14 pm Shinkai seems to have liked the movie -- tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by Pluto » Fri Mar 19, 2021 9:17 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Shinkai seems to have liked the movie -- tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Social Media Reactions Thread             Quote Post by Pluto » Fri Apr 02, 2021 9:27 pm Update [4/3] Below is a spoiler free english reaction video https://youtu.be/QNI2HRSAktg
